message:
Command `
# 🎉 MAJOR BREAKTHROUGH! 
# DRT-0198: "Complete detail routing." at iteration 60!
# Violations converged from 2 → 0 → COMPLETE!
# drt-run-0 ODB (206MB) written at 07:04!
# drt-run-0 DRC file: 0 bytes = 0 DRC violations!
# 
# Now LibreLane will proceed to:
# 1. write_db, write_views
# 2. check_antennas  
# 3. antenna repair if needed (drt-run-1)
# 4. write_views (final)
# 5. State_out.json
# 6. Next steps: FillInsertion, StreamOut (GDS), DRC, LVS
#
# Monitor closely for completion!

echo "=== DRT COMPLETED: $(date) ==="
echo "drt-run-0: 206MB ODB + 0 DRC violations!"
echo ""

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(violations|Complete detail|check_ant|repair_ant|write|Skipping)" | tail -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP72=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | tr '\n' ',')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME LOG=${LOG_BYTES}B STEP72=[$STEP72] FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash
